records.ety: [NL., fr. Gr. "ri`s, "rino`s, the nose + 'egke`falos the brain.]

defs: The division of the brain in front of the prosencephalon, consisting of the two olfactory lobes from which the olfactory nerves arise.
notes: вҳһ The term is sometimes used for one of the olfactory lobes, the plural being used for the two taken together.
